Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The SetRawInitialData method allows initial data to be set directly for the buffer where manual layout attributes have been bound with the BindIndexAttributeManualLayout method.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: SuccessToken SetRawInitialData(const uint8_t* data, size_t dataSizeInBytes);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The source bytes to use when the manually laid out buffer is allocated.
The number of source bytes supplied.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: True if the operation succeeded, false otherwise. An assertion will be raised in debug builds if the result is not tested.
